_comment: DO NOT EDIT: FILE GENERATED AUTOMATICALLY BY PTERODACTYL PANEL
name: Plugin Builder (Universal Pro)
author: dapaupau@sigaul.com
description: Pro-tier Java Plugin Builder egg. Optimized for multi-version building (Java 8-25), auto-detecting Maven/Gradle, and structured workspace management.
startup: if [ "${AUTO_UPDATE}" == "1" ]; then curl -s -o builder.sh https://raw.githubusercontent.com/YuraCloud/plugin-builder/main/builder.sh && chmod +x builder.sh; fi; bash builder.sh

installation.script:
#!/bin/bash
# --- Install Dependencies ---
apt update
apt install -y curl ca-certificates

# --- Create Workspace Structure ---
mkdir -p /mnt/server/files/file
mkdir -p /mnt/server/files/hasil
mkdir -p /mnt/server/logs

cd /mnt/server

# --- Download Builder Script ---
curl -s -o builder.sh https://raw.githubusercontent.com/YuraCloud/plugin-builder/main/builder.sh
chmod +x builder.sh

# --- Branding and Information ---
echo ""
echo "=================================================="
echo "               PLUGIN BUILDER PRO                 "
echo "=================================================="
echo "Informasi Server:"
echo "UUID      : ${P_SERVER_UUID}"
echo "Port      : ${SERVER_PORT}"
echo "Egg Type  : Java Plugin Builder"
echo "Version   : 1.0.0"
echo "=================================================="
echo "    Sistem Build Plugin Otomatis Terpasang!       "
echo "=================================================="
echo ""

variables.name: Default Java Version
variables.description: The initial Java version to use (8, 11, 17, 21, 23, 25).

variables.name: Auto Update Script
variables.description: Update the builder.sh script on every startup.
